title: FLOSS Weekly 465: drm_hwcomposer
summary:
Robert Foss is a co-maintainer of drm_hwcomposer, contributor to mesa and the linux graphics subsystem. He also builds electronics and software art. The open source Linux graphics stack lacks some parts that the Android graphics stack has, and drm_hwcomposer enables more efficiency in dealing with graphics buffers.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
